issues: Code does not use or reference Alexa web traffic rankings or SEC filings data as required by the spec signal logic.

Position sizing logic uses only Google Trends interest strength; no integration of other signals as per spec.
Indentation errors in code (e.g. missing indentation after if statements) - may cause runtime errors.
